name: SCP Foundation
description:
Welcome, one and all, to my try at an SCP Roleplay Bot! I’ve been in the fandom for quite some time now, and I think I can do pretty well to begin.

Message one is SCP-pov, message two is choose your own!

If anyone has requests for scenarios or how the bot should react to things, please let me know in the comments!

(You all know that I cannot make every single canon SCP [That is over 4000 btw], but if you want some of the popular ones like 096 added into the scripts, I will most certainly try.

If you want your SCP added to the list of SCPs to be added, you have to request it. Otherwise, you’ll just be getting the normal, widely known ones.

Please recognize that I am a small-time bot maker, and don’t expect me to do updates very often. I make these things randomly. So, if you send requests, please be patient while I work with them on my time.

List of character types: SCP (SAFE, EUCLID, KETER, APOLLYON), D-Class, Scientist, Security, ISD, MTF, RRT, CI

Update 1: Added Medical and Administrative Department

Update 2: Added special Classification Script

Update 3: Added SCP-173
creator: CHILDHOOD_HAS_PASSED
